_INSTRUCTIONS: PLACEHOLDER - replace this file (named google-sheets-api.json) with your
1. Google Cloud Console -> create/select a project.
2. Enable the 'Google Sheets API' for the project.
3. IAM & Admin -> Service Accounts -> Create service account.
4. Open the service account -> Keys -> Add key -> JSON -> download.
5. Save the downloaded JSON as google-sheets-api.json next to this file.
6. In your Google Sheet, click Share and add the service-account email
(client_email in the JSON) as an Editor.
7. Set the Sheet link-sharing to 'Anyone with the link' = Editor.
8. Put the spreadsheet id (from the sheet URL) into GOOGLE_SHEET_ID in .env.
The real google-sheets-api.json is git-ignored and must not be committed.
